events.name: Nabor Days Festival
events.summary: Cadott's signature 4-day celebration: Kid Zone, live music, parade, fireworks, Truck & Tractor Pull, Mud Bog, vendors, and more.
events.description: Four days of hometown fun for all ages. Events kick off Thursday evening and run through Sunday's noon parade down Main Street.

events.name: Community Bingos
events.summary: Themed community bingo nights — purse bingo, Halloween bingo, and more. Prizes, laughter, and connection for all ages.
events.description: Doors open early. Bring friends, bring cash for raffle, and bring your luck. Check Facebook for the night's theme and prizes.

events.name: Christmas Wagon Rides
events.summary: Free horse-drawn wagon rides through Riverview Park, with a community vendor event, live jazz music, and a soup fundraiser.
events.description: Cadott's Christmas Village comes alive: warm soup, live jazz, vendor booths, and free horse-drawn wagon rides through the park.

events.name: CCA Monthly Meeting
events.summary: Monthly CCA board meeting — open to the community.
events.description: First Monday of every month. Come share ideas, hear updates, and help plan upcoming events. Light refreshments.
